name: Silk Thread
description: Ultra-smooth silk textures with flowing softness

prompts.SessionStart: pure sine tone ascending smoothly with clean bright attack, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SessionEnd: pure sine tone descending smoothly with clean release, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.Stop: single pure sine tone ping with clean sustain and smooth decay, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PreToolUse: quick crisp sine click with precise attack and instant release, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PostToolUse: short sine tone chirp confirming with smooth upward glide, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two pure sine tones with questioning ascending interval, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady sine wave pulse with clear rhythmic pattern, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStart: pure sine tone splitting into two diverging frequencies, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.SubagentStop: clear sine tone returning with smooth resolving glide, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright sine tone burst with quick ascending sweep, ultra-clean minimal tone, notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, pristine
